title: 🎖️Carpe Diem → Gather ye rosebuds while ye may
quote: Old Time is still a-flying; And this same flower that smiles to-day, To-morrow will be dying. (Robert Herrick 1648)
question:
Create a Java program using class inheritance based on the concept of 'Carpe Diem'.

A student believes every day is a new chance to succeed and live fully.

Your program must:
- Create a base class Poem that stores: title, quote, inspiration, and language.
- Create a child class CarpeDiem that inherits from Poem.
- Add a method that prints a motivational message about seizing the day and making the most of every opportunity.
- Demonstrate the idea that time is always moving and opportunities should not be wasted.

title: 🚢 O Captain! My Captain (Walt Whitman 1865) 🚢
quote: O Captain! My Captain! our fearful Trip is done .....
inspiration: ✅ A Quote for Abraham Lincoln by Walt Whitman
question:
Create a Java program using class inheritance based on the following concept:

A poem titled 'O Captain! My Captain' (Walt Whitman, 1865) describes a ship’s journey at sea 
. The captain must choose between two paths:

If the captain chooses the safe course (true), the ship survives and reaches hope and safety.
If the captain chooses dangerous course (false), the ship is lost at sea.

Your program must:
- Create a base class Poem that stores: :- title 
, :-Quote 
, :-inspiration
, and language.
- Create a child class ShipPoem that inherits from Poem.
- Add a method that takes a boolean decision and prints the outcome of the ship’s journey. 
 Good Luck 🚀
